ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or department offering the course */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Course number */,
  "prereqs" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently active */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term during which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course offering */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course offering */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., Open, Closed, Waitlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is auditing the course */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the student withdrew from the course, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the student is in (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_info_sheets" (
  "sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course information sheet */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the sheet belongs to */,
  "sheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the course information sheet */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the course information sheet was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the course information sheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_info_sheets_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
